title: Smoky Kenyan Cheese Toast
description: A smoky, chewy brunch dish featuring parmesan and a hint of Kenyan flavor, perfect for keto diets.

ingredients.name: kenyan smoked cheese
ingredients.notes: Use a traditional Kenyan smoked cheese like chakalaka cheese or similar

instructions: Heat a skillet over medium heat and add olive oil.
Add smoked cheese and parmesan cheese to the skillet. Stir gently until melted and slightly browned.
Sprinkle flax seeds and black sesame seeds over the cheese mixture.
Cook for 2-3 minutes until the cheese is fully melted and the seeds are toasted.
Serve warm on a slice of whole-grain bread for a keto-friendly crunch.
